titleStmt.title: SII 19.341: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 341. (A.R. No. 280 of 1906.) TIRUMĀLPURAM, WALAJAPET TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is incomplete and damaged in places. It records an endowment made by (prince) Madhurāntakaṉ Gaṇḍarāḍittaṉ for the supply of 4 nāḻi each of honey, ghee, milk, curd, sesamum and pulses to be filled in 108 pots, and of other ingredients for the sacred bath of the god on every sankrānti day of the months in the temple of Mahā dēva at Tirumālpēṟu in Dāmar-kōṭṭam. This is an inscription of Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟ
ki yāṇṭu 14vatu tāmaṟko
ṭṭattu tirumālppeṟṟu ma
hādevarkku maturāntakaṉ ka
ṇṭarātittaṉ candrādittaval
tiṅkaḷ saṅgrān=titoṟum nūṟṟe
ṭṭuk kalacattiṉuḷ teṉ nāṉāḻiyun ney nāṉāḻiyum pāl nāṉāḻiyu
yun tayir nāṉāḻiyum poriyum porinūṟuṅ kuṟuṇiyuṅ kaṭuku nāṉāḻiyum Eḷḷu
nāṉāḻiyum Uḻuntu nāṉāḻiyun tiṉai nāṉāḻiyuṅ karuppucāṟu nāṉāḻiyum Iḷa
nir nāṉāḻiyum tiruccuṇṇam nāṉāḻiyum payaṟu nāṉāḻiyum laṅkaḷ nāṉāḻiyu
m tiruccuṇṇamum citāriyum snapanadravyattukkum tiruppaḷḷittāmattu
kkumāka pavitramuṭpaṭa ṟukkumā
Digital edition of SII 19.341 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
